visual_description: A woman with curly blonde hair and a man with dark hair sit side by side, both holding food items and looking toward the right. The woman gestures with her free hand while the man holds his food close to his mouth. Behind them, other people are visible but out of focus, suggesting a crowded public setting.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in English.
